activities_projects.title: Character Description of the Child
activities_projects.objective: Understand the personality of the child
steps: Read the story carefully
Write 5 sentences describing the nature of the child
Support your points with examples from the story

activities_projects.title: Reasons for Lagging Behind
activities_projects.objective: Understand why the child keeps lagging behind
steps: Identify the different attractions on the way to the fair
List the reasons why the child stops again and again
Explain them briefly

activities_projects.title: Fair Attractions List
activities_projects.objective: Identify the attractions present in the fair
steps: List the different attractions the child notices at the fair
Write one sentence describing each attraction

activities_projects.title: Child’s Changing Desires
activities_projects.objective: Understand how the child’s desires change
steps: Identify the items the child wanted before getting lost
Explain why he refuses them later

activities_projects.title: Description of the Crowd
activities_projects.objective: Understand how the crowd is described in the story
steps: Find the paragraph describing the crowd
Write 4–5 lines explaining how the crowd affected the child

activities_projects.title: Actions of the Kind Man
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the behaviour of the man who helps the child
steps: List the different things the man offers the child
Explain why he tries these methods

activities_projects.title: Sequence Chart
activities_projects.objective: Understand the flow of events in the story
steps: Write five important events in the story
Arrange them in chronological order

activities_projects.title: Theme Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify the main theme of the story
steps: Think about the message conveyed by the story
Write 4–5 sentences explaining the theme

activities_projects.title: Feelings Before and After Getting Lost
steps: Describe how the child felt before getting lost
Describe how he felt after getting lost

activities_projects.title: Lesson Learned
activities_projects.objective: Understand the value conveyed by the story
steps: Think about the importance of parents shown in the story
Write 5 sentences explaining what the story teaches us
